caption:
2026 年第一场赛事【拉曼杯 】🏆

多媒体大学华文学会舞狮班迎来新一年的首战，在【拉曼杯传统南狮邀请赛】中稳定发挥、全力以赴，最终荣获 
公开组亚军🥈与大学组冠军🏆的佳绩。

在忙于课业的同时，团队依然愿意牺牲时间，在比赛前的每一个夜晚坚持训练。这份努力与默契，成就了今天的成绩。这同时也是 2026 年一个漂亮的开始。💪🏼
感谢所有朋友的支持与陪伴，我们会继续向前。🦁🔥

2026’s first competition — TARUMT Cup 🏆

The Multimedia University Chinese Language Society Lion Dance Team kicked off the new year strong at the TARUMT Cup Traditional Lion Dance Competition. Through steady performance and full commitment, the team achieved Runner-Up in the Open Category 🥈 and Champion in the University Category 🏆.

While managing their academic commitments, the team still chose to sacrifice time and dedicate every night before the competition to training. This hard work and teamwork led to today’s results—and marked a strong start to 2026.💪🏼 Thank you to all friends and supporters for standing with us. Let’s move forward together. 🦁🔥

『首金与银🥇🥈』辉煌战绩

2024年12月22日，多媒体大学（赛城）文化股舞狮班在首届《亚大杯》南狮传统争霸赛中，载誉而归：

🥇 荣获大学组金奖
🥈 摘得《亚大杯》公开组亚军

衷心感谢亚太科技大学醒狮团提供这个宝贵的平台，让我们有机会传承与发扬传统文化！🔥 我们承诺，下一次必将带回更多奖牌，与大家分享更大的荣耀！

『 First Gold and Silver🥇🥈』 A Glorious Achievement

On 22 December 2024, the Lion Dance Class of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) Cultural Division made a triumphant return from the inaugural APU Cup Traditional Lion Dance Championship:

🥇 Champion of the University Category
🥈 Runner-up of the Open Category

We sincerely thank APU Lion Dance Club for providing this invaluable platform, allowing us to preserve and promote our traditional culture! 🔥 We promise to bring even more medals next time and share greater glory with everyone!

#第一届亚大杯 #舞狮争霸战
